invariants.description: globals.d.ts must exist for TypeScript ambient declarations
Must have at least 19 stutter variant files
l0Channels.js must define at least 25 channel constants
Every L0_CHANNELS constant must be referenced in at least one src/ file
Must have all 27 trust system pair assignments defined
All stutter variants must self-register via stutterVariants.register

Doubled fallback: `V.optionalFinite(x, N) || M` or `safePreBoot.call(fn, N) || M` is a dead outer fallback that also silently rewrites legitimate 0/false readings (see the regimeClassifierClassification 0->0.5 tension...
invariants.context: Doubled fallback: `V.optionalFinite(x, N) || M` or `safePreBoot.call(fn, N) || M` is a dead outer fallback that also silently rewrites legitimate 0/false readings (see the regimeClassifierClassification 0->0.5 tension bug). Use the inner value directly, or nullish coalescing (??) if you want to catch only undefined.

invariants.description: Map/object histogram counter reads should use `?? 0` not `|| 0`.
invariants.context: Map/object histogram counter reads should use `?? 0` not `|| 0`. A zero count in `(counts.get(k) || 0) + 1` is coerced to 0 + 1  correct here  but the idiom is brittle; `?? 0` documents intent and won't break if the counter type changes to allow falsy non-undefined values.
